creator: xmj@chaot.net
text:
Have you been able to run this port recently?

Even after correcting for all the bugs in files/Wingz3 regarding use of sed 
and actually brandelf the Linux binary /usr/local/Wingz3/bin/LINUX/WingzPro,
the only thing I get with any recent version of Linux base (Fedora 10, CentOS 6)
is:

ELF interpreter /lib/ld-linux.so.1 not found

Both f10 and c6 provide /lib/ld-linux.so.2 and they have been around for a
significantly long amount of time, so I'm thinking it would make sense to
retire this port.

Best,
-J

-- 
xmj@chaot.net
http://xmj.me

On Wed, Mar 12, 2014 at 03:45:48PM -0400, Mikhail T. wrote:
> On 12.03.2014 15:33, Johannes Jost Meixner wrote:
> > -PORTREVISION=	2
> > +PORTREVISION=	3
> Thanks for the patch, but why bump the port revision? Does the resulting package
> change in any way? Yours,
> 
>     -mi
>
